title: switch_project intro commit — multiple latent bugs

ground_truths.description: switchProjectCore reads process.cwd() which = plugin dir, not user's project dir. Handoff metadata ends up with wrong source path. Fixed by adding CURRENT_CWD_FILE plumbing in 7e7a458.
switch_project MCP tool has no admin check — any caller can invoke it. /project command path has isAdmin() but MCP path was missing. Fixed in later 6c9b0ea.

notes: Both DeepSeek and Kimi independently caught the admin-gate bug on first run. The cwd bug is much subtler.

title: userAccountMap rebuilt on startup from accounts[] but never persisted on change

ground_truths.description: After a user sends their first message, userAccountMap gets populated in-memory. If the server restarts before the write to user_account_ids.json, the routing is lost. Fix: save synchronously inside handleInbound.

notes: Long-running process bug — manifests only after restart.

title: Config hot-reload registered inside existsSync guard that never matches cold-start

ground_truths.description: watch(CONFIG_FILE) inside `if (existsSync(CONFIG_FILE))`. On cold start config.json doesn't exist yet — daemon creates it — so watcher never registers. Hot-reload silently broken on fresh install.

notes: Only shows on fresh installs. Dev machines with pre-existing config would never reproduce.

title: daemon wire-up had multiple blocking issues from first review pass

ground_truths.description: Review surfaced issues across daemon.ts, os-notify.ts, config-loader.ts, rules.ts, ccswitch-sink.ts. Fix touched 343 lines in daemon.ts alone. Intro commit 465dd3a was the 'wire sources → ring-buffer → rules → router' step — most of the bugs live there.

notes: Multi-file / multi-issue fix. Ground truth intentionally broad — any find in daemon.ts is acceptable for this bug.

title: get_page_screenshot swallows inner error on failure

ground_truths.description: Returns {success: request.status === 'completed', ...} but no top-level error field when failed. Nested request.error gets dropped by downstream compressResultForDisplay. User sees empty {}.

title: Browser extension service-worker not kept alive + review fixes

ground_truths.description: Various issues from Plan D browser extension initial ship — SW suspension during long WS idle, missing deviceToken refresh on 401, etc.

notes: Multi-issue review commit; ground truths broad.

title: browser_auth claim-device endpoint: multiple latent bugs

ground_truths.description: save(update_fields=[...'last_seen_at']) but existing.last_seen_at is never assigned in the rotation branch. Django will persist whatever stale value was on the record. Caught INDEPENDENTLY BY 5 OF 7 MODELS as the primary bug at this commit — user's own ground truth was originally about a different issue (401 messaging). Upgrading ground truth to match reality.
claim-device has no row lock on the existing lookup+update path. Two concurrent claims could race. Caught by kimi + gpt + deepseek.

notes: 5/7 consensus on views.py:56 — the single strongest data point of Experiment 0. Models converged on a real bug user hadn't labeled. Demonstrates jury's value: 5 independent reviewers finding the same real bug with near-zero FP rate.
